features.md:
**One-line install** (medium) — Install bridge daemon via brew (macOS), winget (Windows) or curl script (Linux)
**cosmoremote start** (medium) — CLI command that detects Claude Code and Codex, starts local WebSocket server and displays QR code in terminal
**QR code pairing** (low) — App scans QR to get local IP and auth token, connects via WebSocket directly on the same network
**CLI selector** (low) — Choose Claude Code or Codex per session before sending
**Working directory selector** (low) — Saved projects with friendly names, quick-switch between them in the composer
**Real-time streaming** (medium) — Token-by-token output streamed via WebSocket with auto-scroll, no polling
**Syntax highlighting** (low) — Code blocks in output rendered with language-specific highlighting
**Copy output** (low) — Copy full session output or a specific code block with one tap
**Connection status indicator** (low) — Visual badge showing connected local, remote or disconnected state
**Auth (email + password)** (medium) — User account creation and login to enable backend relay and sync
**Remote relay** (high) — Encrypted WebSocket relay via backend when outside local Wi-Fi network
**Session history** (medium) — All past sessions persisted in backend, accessible from any device
**Offline history** (medium) — Past sessions cached locally and readable without connection to the Mac
**Thread list** (low) — All sessions listed with status (running / idle / error), grouped by project
**Daily message limit enforcement** (medium) — Track messages per day per user, block when free tier limit of 20 is reached
**Upgrade prompt** (low) — Show paywall when free user hits message or session limit
**iOS app** (high) — Native iOS app built with Swift and SwiftUI
**Android app** (high) — Native Android app built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
**Parallel sessions** (high) — Run multiple simultaneous sessions each with its own independent CLI process on the Mac
**Unlimited messages/day** (low) — No daily message cap for Pro users
**Multiple Macs** (high) — Pair and switch between multiple Mac machines inside the app
**Pro subscription (monthly)** (medium) — US$4.99/month recurring subscription via RevenueCat and App Store / Play Store
**Pro subscription (annual)** (medium) — US$49.90/year recurring subscription, equivalent to 10 months paid and 2 free
**Restore purchases** (low) — Restore active Pro subscription on a new device

listings.title: CosmoRemote
listings.subtitle: Gerencie seu Codex e Claude
listings.description:
Aumente sua produtividade com CosmoRemote!

Gerencie múltiplas sessões de Claude Code e Codex de forma eficiente e produtiva. Com CosmoRemote, você pode:

• Gerenciar múltiplas sessões paralelas
• Histórico por projeto
• Streaming em tempo real
• Conexão ao Mac via servidor bridge standalone

E com a versão Pro, você ganha:

• Sessões paralelas ilimitadas
• Mensagens ilimitadas por dia
• Conexão a vários Macs

Baixe agora e aumente sua produtividade!
